LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.Protects_Desc: What body parts the shield protects.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.UsableWithShield: Whether or not this weapon can be used if the character also has a shield equipped.
LanguageData.VEF.Weapons.Stat_Thing_MaterialPerCharge: The amount of {0} per charge this ability needs to be recharged.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.ModInfo: This faction is added by {ModName} and not currently present in your game.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.HiddenFactionInf: This is a hidden faction and won't show up in your faction list.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.RequiredFactionI: It is marked as required by {ModName}.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.NonSpawningFacti: This faction is marked as non-spawning and you should probably just ignore it.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.FactionButtonIgn: Don't ask for this faction again
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.FactionMessageFa: Failed to create a faction with settlements.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.FactionDiscovery: It is marked as required, and you must add it to the game.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.FactionFailedMes: Failed to generate this faction. It is recommended to try again, but you can now skip adding this faction. Skipping may cause issues.
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.FactionRequired: {FACTION} cannot be disabled{REQUIRED_multiple ? , you need at least {REQUIRED} factions of that type. : .}
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.FactionRecommend: {REQUIRED_multiple ? It is recommended to have at least {REQUIRED} factions of {FACTION} type, but currently there's only {COUNT}. : It is recommended to enable {FACTION}.}
LanguageData.VanillaFactionsExpanded.FactionMinDistan: The minimum distance from player bases (recommended are {0}): {1}
LanguageData.VSE.ReinforcementsDesc: Seeing that your forces suffered losses, {FACTION_name} has decided to reinforce their raiding force
LanguageData.VWEL_ToggleHotshotDesc: Shots fired when standing still warm-up the weapon allowing for increased firing speed. Overheating can lead to detonation.
LanguageData.VFE_DeepDrillNo: Deep drill cannot be used with {0}.
LanguageData.VEF.TotalMarketValueRange_Desc: Total market value range (minimum and maximum) of the objects that can be found by opening this loot box.
LanguageData.VEF.TotalMarketValueRange_Quality_Desc: Total market value range (minimum and maximum) of the objects that can be found by opening this loot box. Box quality has modified the base value by a factor of {0}
LanguageData.VPE_MinifiedFlowerWillDieIn: Extracted flower will die in {time} unless replanted.
LanguageData.VPE_ExtractFlower_Desc: Extract this flower while keeping it alive, so that it can be replanted elsewhere.
LanguageData.VPE_ReplantFlower_Desc: The flower is currently packaged up for storage and transport. Use this command to replant it in the new location.
LanguageData.VPE_LeaflessBeauty_Desc: Blooming flowers are pretty ugly when leafless due to cold. They won't die just for being leafless, but their beauty will be greatly affected.
LanguageData.VPE_MustBeGrown: Plant must be fully grown before you can add age to it
LanguageData.VPE_AgeBeautyModifier_Desc: The beauty of this plant will increase by this amount for every year it is kept alive, up to a maximum of +{0}.
LanguageData.VPE_BloomBeautyModifier_Desc: The beauty of this plant will be multiplied by this amount when in its blooming stage.
LanguageData.VPE_BloomingPeriod_Desc: This flower will enter a blooming stage in this period, or the equivalent in days of the year in permanent summer / winter.
LanguageData.VPE_BloomTemperatureMin_Desc: The minimum temperature the plant will need to enter a blooming stage.\n\n{0}
LanguageData.VPE_CanBloom: If the blooming stops due to low temperature, this flower can enter a blooming stage again if the conditions improve.
LanguageData.VPE_CantBloom: If the blooming stops due to low temperature, this flower won't be able to bloom again until next year!
LanguageData.VPE_DeadlyColdTemperature_Desc: Below this temperature, the plant will start dying.
